name: codeburn
description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability.
summaryZh: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
